title: Cancer incidence in Canada: trends and projections (1983-2032) - HPCDP: Volume 35, Supplement 1, Spring 2015 - Canada.ca
content:
## Cancer incidence in Canada: trends and projections (1983-2032) - HPCDP: Volume 35, Supplement 1, Spring 2015

### Cancer incidence in Canada: trends and projections (1983-2032)
L. Xie, MSc; R. Semenciw, MSc; L. Mery, MSc
https://doi.org/10.24095/hpcdp.35.S1.02
This article has been peer reviewed.
Surveillance and Epidemiology Division, Centre for Chronic Disease Prevention, Public Health Agency of Canada, Ottawa, Ontario, Canada
Correspondence : Lin Xie, Surveillance and Epidemiology Division, Centre for Chronic Disease Prevention, Public Health Agency of Canada, 785 Carling Avenue, AL 6807A, Ottawa, ON K1A 0K9; Tel.: 613-952-5176; Fax: 613-960-0944; Email: lin.xie@phac-aspc.gc.ca
